title: CNC Machinist
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Join Barona Teollisuus Oy as a CNC Machinist in Vantaa! Competitive wages, flexible hours, and opportunities for skill development await you. Apply now!
description: We are looking for a skilled CNC machinist with experience in turning and milling to join our production team at Barona Teollisuus Oy in Vantaa. This permanent employment opportunity offers competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements, working time flexibility (2-shift work), and the chance to influence your job description. With modern machinery and a stable, developing work environment, you'll have access to well-maintained machines and opportunities for skill development. The company values expertise, initiative, and a commitment to quality. Apply quickly as this position will be filled soon after suitable candidates are found.
what_we_expect: Experience in CNC turning and/or milling.
Strong machining skills with proficiency in Fanuc, Heidenhain, or Mori controls.
Independent programming and setting capabilities.
Willingness to work independently and problem-solving skills.
A careful and high-quality approach to work.
job_responsibilities: Work with modern machinery and utilize strong machining expertise and programming skills.
Program and machine parts on a DMG Mori NLX 2500 multifunction lathe (M730UM control) or Heidenhain controlled machining centers (TNC 530 / 620 / 640).
Optimize tool selection, perform measurements, and ensure quality assurance.
what_we_offer: Stable and developing work environment
Modern and well-maintained machines
Opportunity to influence job description
Supportive team and development of skills in demanding machining work
search_keywords: CNC Machinist, CNC Turning, CNC Milling, Modern Machinery, Expertise, Initiative, Development, Engineering Company, Small Pieces, Production Development, CAD/CAM Know-How

title: Barber-hairdresser
meta_description: Join Parturi-Kampaamo Ikköspaikka Ky as a Barber-Hairdresser in Joensuu! A team-driven approach ensures that no one is left alone during customer interactions
description: We are looking for wonderful colleagues with our expanded operations, offering two positions for barber-hairdressers in Joensuu's niinivaara and core centre. New, modern premises provide a cozy environment for both hair salon and beauty salon services. Contract companies can benefit from support to get started (with the option to continue as a work trial), while students with training contracts will have access to ongoing support until graduation. A team-driven approach ensures no one is left alone during customer interactions. Business-specific trainings, 2 renovated air-conditioned offices, and an extensive selection of products are available for both customers and staff. Electronic appointment booking and checkout options enhance convenience.

title: Land construction assistants
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Join Lavonia Oy as a Land Construction Assistant in Espoo, Helsinki, and Vantaa; assist with earthworks, learn from experienced team members, and earn
description: We are seeking experienced land construction assistants for a full-time position at Lavonia Oy, located in Espoo, Helsinki, and Vantaa. The ideal candidate will assist with auxiliary earthworks such as shoveling, spreading soil, insulation, cleaning, and erecting site fences. Previous infrastructure sector experience is highly valued but not the only requirement; a positive attitude and willingness to learn are crucial. Applicants must be in good physical condition and prepared for variable weather conditions. An occupational safety card is mandatory, and having your own car could enhance job opportunities due to varying work sites. The salary ranges from at least TES in the Infrastructure sector, negotiable based on skills and experience.

title: Earth construction foreman, data center site
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Lavonia Oy seeks an Earth Construction Foreman for their Microsoft data center project in Espoo/Kirkkonummi, Finland. Previous experience in earthworks and
description: Lavonia Oy is seeking a driven Earth Construction Foreman for their Microsoft data center project in Espoo/Kirkkonummi, Finland. This role requires previous experience in earthworks and municipal engineering, with responsibilities including coxswain's work, pipe installations, and welding. A valid occupational safety card is essential, as well as proficiency using laser tools and reading construction drawings. Previous experience operating earthmoving machines (such as Kramer, Avant, or other wheeled machines, rollers) is also preferred. The position offers competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements and a salary according to TES, with opportunities for professional development and support.

meta_description: Fin-Terpuu Oy is seeking a Reach Driver for Lappeenranta Summer job, offering full-time work starting in May with €15.42 - €18.02 hourly wage and collective
description: We are looking for reach truck drivers with Finnish language proficiency for our Lappeenranta contracting location at the UPM Kaukaa pulp mill area, offering full-time summer work starting in May according to contract terms until August. Duties include versatile forklift driving duties and computer use, as well as warehouse management and time reporting programs. Experience in wood processing and heavy equipment is preferred. The hourly wage is €15.42 - €18.02 depending on years of experience, with a collective agreement-based pay group III. Fin-Terpuu Oy, part of Kajaani's logistics services for the forest industry, offers versatile work opportunities in internal transport and maintenance. Applications are due by April 30, 2026, at marko.hokkanen@fin-terpuu.fi or markku.

title: Dental worker for a dental laboratory, you do not need previous experience in the field
salary_range: ACCORDING TO THE EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT FOR THE DENTAL LABORATORY FIELD 28.5.2025 31.1.2028
meta_description: Hammas-Apu I Oy, Mikkeli is seeking a Dental worker for a dental laboratory, you do not need previous experience in the field in Mikkeli. We are looking for a
description: We are looking for a dental laboratory assistant at Hammas-Apu I Oy in Mikkeli. This part-time position offers training and is suitable for students or those seeking flexible work arrangements. The role involves maintaining facilities, preparing equipment, and assisting in the manual manufacture of dental prostheses using materials like gypsum, light-cured plastics, acrylics, and metals. Tasks can change frequently, so adaptability and a willingness to learn are key. Previous experience is not required, but strong manual skills are preferred. Training will be provided on-site, making it ideal for those with studies or part-time commitments. The employment relationship lasts until the end of 2026, after which the situation will be reviewed again.

description: We are looking for a wire moped driver at Fin-Terpuu Oy's Lappeenranta contracting destination, UPM Kaukaa pulp mill area, for full-time summer work starting in May. Experience and professionalism are valued, as well as the ability to drive a forklift or wheeled machine, possess a B driver's license, and an occupational safety card. description: Fin-Terpuu Oy, Kaukas Pulp Ja Paperi is seeking water storage workers for their Lappeenranta contracting site, focusing on UPM Kaukaa pulp mill area. The position offers full-time summer work starting in May and ending in August. Duties include moving Bundles of uittopuu using a bulldozer or forklift, with seasonal shifts 2 days per week. Experience in wood processing and heavy equipment is preferred. B driver's license and Occupational safety card are required. The Hourly wage is €14.35 to €16.77 based on years of experience, belonging to II pay group. Fin-Terpuu Oy specializes in logistics services for the forest industry, offering maintenance, consulting, and machine rental. Interested candidates should apply by April 30, 2026, with a CV and previous work experience attached.
